playbook.intent: Travel-day reality → keep momentum without coding, via content, comms, and planning only.
playbook.scope: Digital-nomad reality: on a flight, bus, or unstable-wifi day, keep the indie business moving without coding or shipping — content, comms, planning, and backlog hygiene only, using a pre-defined offline toolkit.

success-criteria.criterion: End-of-day note captures what shipped vs slipped

stage.name: Setup

tasks.task: Sync notes, drafts, and roadmap offline

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when toolkit boots without wifi.

stage.name: Content / Comms
stage.intent: Low-bandwidth, high-yield work during the day.

tasks.task: Reply to email and DMs in batches when wifi opens
Capture customer feedback into local notes

stage.decision-gate: Advance once one output is shippable when wifi returns.

stage.name: Plan
stage.intent: Use travel time to clean and triage the backlog.

tasks.task: Re-score top items with RICE / ICE

stage.decision-gate: Done once backlog is committed and idea log saved.

extra.value: [Shipping product code from unstable wifi, Live customer demos or calls, Deep architecture work — energy mismatch]
['Laptop with offline tools (notes, drafts, planner)', Pre-synced backlog and content calendar]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content travel-day-low-energy-work-mode --format md, agent: faion get-content travel-day-low-energy-work-mode --format context, json: faion get-content travel-day-low-energy-work-mode --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
